records.topic: Upper midrange roughness in most systems
records.quote: Most of them have a roughness to the upper mids that just sounds terrible. They use these great drivers but drive them straight into their cone resonances
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: Anything with DSP had a roughness to it. Every single one of us, by the 3rd floor, could walk into a room blind folded and tell you if it was a DSP system or a passive system. Passive ALWAYS sounded better

records.topic: Some exceptional systems with designers present

records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: This two way was horrendous. One of the worst speakers at the show
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: These were REALLY good. I spoke with the engineer about how they don't measure or simulate well
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: Horrendous upper mid range. So sharp and attacking. Not good
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: I will now never build a line array. This thing just sounded odd. Like a blade of people singing on the left and then a blade of instruments on the right
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: Second best sounding full rang behind a Voight pipe Alpair 11 build. This thing was great. Good dynamics, good upper mid range, very nuetral
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: These were bad. Like just plain bad. Maybe they would sound good if you were 60 feet back in a big room? Crazy directional. Everything sounded muddy
records.author: Bmsluite

records.topic: AudioVideo Artistry speakers with Accuton drivers
records.quote: ******* AMAZING. What do the Accuton driver's sound like? ******* AWESOME. End game design right here
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: Do expensive drivers sound better? In this case, YES YES YES, they ******* do. I had to shake this man's hand
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: This dome was, BY FAR, the best mid at the entire show. Everything else pales in comparison to these. These are like sorcery
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: Grainy, poor imaging, you are hyper aware that the sound is coming from the speaker. No low end dynamics. Great for trumpets and a saxophone
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: My first taste of open baffle. My buddy liked them. I did not. Sounds all washed out. Zero bass
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: These are some of the best at the show. If you can tame a mid planar, nothing really compares for silky smooth vocals. Paul did it right
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: These were the BEST speakers at the show. Unanimous. No question. The best. I don't even think this is subjective
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: The ribbon is exceptional. High were incredible. I asked about buying the tweeter alone and was told I could
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: These are crazy good. For just one driver and a piece of plywood this is insane. These blows away 90% of the 3 way systems in the place
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: #2 best speaker at the place. Insane sound out of a very ugly speaker. I love this
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: This sounds sweeter and more relaxed than anything at the show. Outside of the one using all the accuton drivers mine wins in our book
records.author: Bmsluite
